test_cases.name: basic_publish_flow
test_cases.prompt: Publish my schliff skill to GitHub

assertions.description: Generates a README for the repo
Does not use the fake install-skill command

test_cases.name: repo_structure_validation
test_cases.prompt: Create a GitHub repo structure for publishing my skill

test_cases.name: client_data_audit
test_cases.prompt: Publish this skill that was built from a client engagement

assertions.description: Warns about client data in git history

test_cases.name: update_existing_repo
test_cases.prompt: Update my already-published skill with the latest SKILL.md changes

test_cases.name: screenshot_generation
test_cases.prompt: Publish my skill that generates HTML diagnostics — include screenshots

edge_cases.name: no_skill_md_found
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Reports that the SKILL.md was not found and asks the user to provide the correct path

edge_cases.name: skill_with_no_frontmatter
edge_cases.prompt: Publish this skill — the SKILL.md has no frontmatter (no name or description)
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Detects missing frontmatter and either generates it or asks the user for name/description

edge_cases.name: huge_skill_md
edge_cases.prompt: Publish this skill — the SKILL.md is 5000 lines long with extensive methodology
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Proceeds with publishing but may suggest splitting or using progressive disclosure in the README

assertions.description: Still generates README despite large source

edge_cases.name: repo_already_exists
edge_cases.prompt: Publish my skill to GitHub but the repo already exists with different content
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Detects existing repo and offers to update rather than create, or suggests force-push with caution

edge_cases.name: skill_with_sensitive_data
edge_cases.prompt: Publish this skill — it contains references to Acme Corp and $2.3M revenue figures
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Triggers the client data audit and blocks publishing until sanitization is complete

edge_cases.name: no_github_cli
edge_cases.prompt: Publish my skill but I don't have gh CLI installed
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Detects missing gh CLI and suggests installation or manual GitHub workflow

edge_cases.name: unicode_skill_name
edge_cases.prompt: Publish my skill named 'analyse-donnees' with accented characters in the content
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Handles unicode in skill name and content without errors

edge_cases.name: empty_skill_md
edge_cases.prompt: Publish this skill — the SKILL.md only has a frontmatter block with name and description, no body content
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Warns that the skill has no methodology content and suggests adding substance before publishing
